---
title: "test_freya_aesthetics_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_freya_aesthetics_empire.py"
loc: 54
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.38
style_score: 1.00
intel_score: 5.84
overall_score: 3.70
---

## Intent
The `test_freya_aesthetics_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestFreyaWarden, warden, color_theory, test_scan_finds_hover_breach, test_scan_finds_color_breach, test_birkhoff_measure_breach, test_golden_ratio_breach, test_aesthetic_pass. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestFreyaWarden, warden, color_theory, test_scan_finds_hover_breach, test_scan_finds_color_breach, test_birkhoff_measure_breach, test_golden_ratio_breach, test_aesthetic_pass. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 1.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.freya](file://src.sentinel.wardens.freya)

### Exports
- `TestFreyaWarden`
- `warden`
- `color_theory`
- `test_scan_finds_hover_breach`
- `test_scan_finds_color_breach`
- `test_birkhoff_measure_breach`
- `test_golden_ratio_breach`
- `test_aesthetic_pass`
